commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=11fab4eebd4369682f348c358d1ed6378a1a291e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Codex System Account promotion to copy managed auth into the live Codex home, refresh account-scoped state, reload or restart the Codex app-server daemon, close menu hierarchy, and add focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR feature review. Source inspection confirms the changed System Account promotion and daemon reload paths, but the posted runtime proof still does not demonstrate the real app/menu path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the auth/daemon restart behavior; automation cannot supply the real setup proof for this external PR.

target.title: Add Codex account switcher promotion
target.body:
## Summary

- keep the Codex status-menu account switcher display-only; selecting an account there only changes the displayed account
- add explicit `System Account` submenu promotion for managed Codex accounts, which copies the chosen managed auth into the live Codex home
- restart the Codex app-server daemon after auth promotion, preserving remote-control mode by using `codex remote-control start` when daemon settings enable remote control
- refresh account-scoped Codex state as user-initiated work and surface daemon restart failures without rolling back the auth switch

## Review repair / proof

- Rebased on current `main` (`b3c0d57`), so the Providers pane search implementation, localized strings, tests, and changelog entry remain from main.
- Verified the PR diff no longer touches the provider-search files:
  - `git diff --name-status origin/main | rg "PreferencesProvidersPane|PreferencesProviderSidebarView|Localizable.strings|CHANGELOG|ProvidersPaneCoverageTests"` produced no output.
- Verified provider search still runs in the focused macOS suite:
  - `ProvidersPaneCoverageTests` included `provider search filters display names and raw ids`.
- Redacted menu-flow proof from the isolated macOS test fixture:
  - Flow: Codex status menu -> `System Account` submenu -> `[managed-account]`.
  - Normal account switcher click remains display-only via `StatusMenuCodexSwitcherTests`.
  - Resulting live account: live auth changed from `[live-account]` to `[managed-account]` in isolated `CODEX_HOME`.
  - Restart feedback: `RecordingCodexAppServerDaemonReloader.reloadCallCount == 1`, with success outcome `.restarted`.
  - Failure feedback: restart failure presents alert title `System account switched` and message containing `could not restart the Codex app-server daemon`.
  - Remote-control preservation: with daemon settings `{"remoteControlEnabled": true}`, command log is `["app-server daemon version", "remote-control start"]`.
- Rebuilt/deployed proof on the Mac mini from PR head `11fab4ee`:
  - Packaged from detached worktree `/tmp/codexbar-pr1218-deploy-11fab4e` with `CODEXBAR_SIGNING=adhoc ./Scripts/package_app.sh release`.
  - `codesign --verify --deep --strict /tmp/codexbar-pr1218-deploy-11fab4e/CodexBar.app` exited 0 before install.
  - Installed app reports `CodexGitCommit=11fab4ee`.
  - Running process after launch: `95276 /Users/openclaw/projects/CodexBar/CodexBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CodexBar`.
  - Rechecked after 5 seconds: same process remained running.
  - Rollback bundle preserved at `/Users/openclaw/projects/CodexBar/CodexBar.app.backup-6fe01054-before-11fab4e-20260529T2150Z` and reports `CodexGitCommit=6fe01054`.

## Testing

- `git diff --check`
- Slop check on the final diff: no placeholders, filler comments, commented-out code, scope drift, duplicate logic, or missing guardrails found.
- `swift test --package-path /tmp/codexbar-pr1218-deploy-11fab4e --filter "CodexAppServerDaemonReloaderTests|CodexSystemPromotionUITests|StatusMenuCodexSystemPromotionTests|CodexAccountPromotionServiceTests|StatusMenuCodexSwitcherTests|ProviderStorageFootprintTests|ProvidersPaneCoverageTests"` on macOS from detached `11fab4ee` worktree
  - Passed: 94 tests in 7 suites.
target.author: rendrag-git

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
